hero.title: I build systems that solve real problems.
hero.subtitle: FullStack Developer

childhood.title: It all started with a question...
childhood.subtitle: The first steps
childhood.text_1: How do things work? That curiosity led me to disassemble computers, read programming books I didn't understand, and write my first lines of code. Every error was a discovery, every blue screen a lesson.
childhood.text_2: Over time, that obsession with understanding became the ability to build. I went from copying tutorials to designing my own solutions, from solving small problems to tackling real challenges that impact real people.
childhood.text_3: Today, every project is an extension of that same curiosity. The difference is that now I have the tools, the experience, and the discipline to turn ideas into systems that work — and that matter.

abstract.title: Curiosity became engineering.
abstract.text: Every project is an opportunity to transform abstract ideas into concrete solutions that impact people's lives.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of works that represent my evolution as a developer

Description.title: About me
Description.first_p: I'm a programmer passionate about using technology to create innovative solutions and tools. I consider myself a person who enjoys learning new technologies, tools and finding new challenges to solve. I'm excited about entering a challenging project.
